title: Hardened Survival NEO
description: Survival too boring and easy? This is for you.
body:
**_PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE USE THE BUILT IN SHADERPACK, I HAVENT DONE ANY TESTING WITH IT OFF AND IT WILL LIKELY LOOK TERRIBLE._**

## As the name states, survival.. but hard.

Mobs too stupid? Fixed that.

Just sleeping the night away right before anything can spawn? Wait some more.
  - _**Requires Dusk and Cupboard mods, linked in External Mod Sources.**_

Mobs not carrying anything unique? Gear _and_ rarities inbound.

What's that on the map? Fire Dragon?

Do you feel safe? Fixed that.

But don't think I just buffed mobs. You can easily reach a similar level of power.
Spells, guns, item leveling, rarities, and so much more will give you that power curve you need. Just don't get too cocky.

_And don't worry, there's **so much more** for you to find, so get out there!_

External Mod Sources:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### **HIGHLY RECOMMEND GETTING THESE TWO:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Cupboard: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard)
- Dusk: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dusk](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dusk)

The configs come with the pack, so don't worry about changing them.

</details>



- Apotheosis: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis)
- Apothic Attributes: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes)
- Obscure Tooltips: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obscure-tooltips](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obscure-tooltips)
- Obscure API: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obscure-api](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obscure-api)
- Quark: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark)
- Quark Oddities: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-oddities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-oddities)
- Placebo: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/placebo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/placebo)
- CIT Resewn: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn)
- Forgery: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgery)
- Loot Journal: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-journal-neoforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-journal-neoforge)
- Lootbeams: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-beams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-beams)
- Player Animator: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/playeranimator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/playeranimator)

Note that all forge mods WILL work with the current version of NeoForge.
</details>

External Resource Pack Sources:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Tissou's Zombie Pack: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-20](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-20)

Quark Programmer Art & Basic Nether Ores 32x come preloaded with their mods, and don't have direct links nor can be removed from the files. I would not recommend using them in this pack.

</details>
